description:
Control multiple Windows systems using the keyboard/mouse attached to one computer

Input Director enables the control of multiple Windows systems using the keyboard/mouse attached to one computer
Switch control between systems either by hotkey or by moving the cursor to the screen edge on one computer for it to appear on the next one
Input Director supports a shared clipboard - copy on one computer, switch control, and paste
Input Director v2.4 is available for download.
New features include:
- Can now disable/enable bindings from the application and by right-clicking the ID icon and selecting the option from the pop-up menu.
- Macros can now be played to a Client system prior to logging into it
- Hotkeys can now be set to use either of the ctrl, shift, or alt keys instead of needing to specify a left or right version
- Shared Clipboard improvements and bug fixes
- Can now hide IP Addresses displayed by Input Director (VLogger Mode)
- Macro recording improvements
- Upgraded OpenSSL library to v3.5
- Fixed bug that could stop Input Director from recreating its icon when the Windows Shell restarts
- Fixed bug that could cause cursor wraparound not to work with complex monitor layouts
- Minor bug fixes
- Updated the packaged Microsoft redistributable libraries
